name: Vegetable Mulligatawny
recipeIngredient: 2 Small Granny Smith apples; pared, cored, and chopped
1 1/2 cups Frozen spinach; thawed and squeezed dry
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, heat the oil over medium heat. Add onion, celery, and garlic. Cook, stirring frequently, for 4-5 minutes until tender.
2. Add apples, carrot, and parsley. Cook, stirring frequently, for an additional 2 minutes.
3. Stir in broth, water (2 cups), potatoes, curry powder, chili powder, allspice, thyme, and pepper. Bring to a boil.
4. Reduce heat to low and cover the pot. Simmer for 45 minutes.
5. Remove 2 cups of the soup with a spoon and puree until smooth in a food processor. Return the purée back to the soup.
6. Add spinach and simmer for an additional 2-3 minutes, until heated through.
Each serving provides: 1/2 fat, 2 vegetables, 1/2 fruit, 40 carbs. 153 calories. Weight Watchers magazine
